name: Western Wireless Corporation
description: Western Wireless Corporation was a prominent cellular network operator based in Bellevue, Washington, that provided mobile telecommunications services to subscribers across 19 western states in the United States, as well as in seven other countries. Founded in 1994, the company primarily marketed its services under the Cellular One brand name. It is notable for spinning off its VoiceStream Wireless subsidiary in 1999, which was subsequently acquired by Deutsche Telekom AG and rebranded as T-Mobile USA. The company was eventually acquired by Alltel Corporation in 2005, marking the end of its independent operations.
